values.content:
=You are a senior technical project manager.

Generate a comprehensive project plan for the following:

Project Description: {{ $json.body.projectDescription }}
Budget: ${{ $json.body.budget }}
Client ID: {{ $json.body.clientId }}
Merchant ID: {{ $json.body.merchantId }}

Generate:
* project scope
* milestones (array with name, deliverables, budget allocation)
* tasks (array with name, milestone, estimated hours)
* acceptance criteria
* risks (array with description, mitigation)
* timeline (optimistic, realistic, conservative in days)
* escrow structure (array with milestone, percentage, release condition)

Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no code blocks, just the JSON object.

=You are a senior technical project manager.

Generate a comprehensive project plan for the following:

Project Description: {{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.projectDescription }}
Budget: ${{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.budget }}
Client ID: {{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.clientId }}
Merchant ID: {{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.merchantId }}

Generate:
* project scope
* milestones (array with name, deliverables, budget allocation)
* tasks (array with name, milestone, estimated hours)
* acceptance criteria
* risks (array with description, mitigation)
* timeline (optimistic, realistic, conservative in days)
* escrow structure (array with milestone, percentage, release condition)

Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no code blocks, just the JSON object.

=You are a technical requirements analyst.

Analyze the following project plan and break down requirements into atomic, testable units:

Project Scope: {{ $json.planData.projectScope }}
Milestones: {{ JSON.stringify($json.planData.milestones) }}
Tasks: {{ JSON.stringify($json.planData.tasks) }}

Generate:
* functionalRequirements (array with id, description, priority, testable)
* technicalRequirements (array with id, description, category)
* dependencies (array with requirementId, dependsOn)
* estimatedComplexity (low/medium/high/critical)

Return ONLY valid JSON.

=You are a senior software engineering estimator.

Analyze the following project requirements and calculate complexity metrics:

Project Scope: {{ $json.planData.projectScope }}
Requirements Breakdown: {{ $input.first().json.message.content }}
Budget: ${{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.budget }}

Calculate:
* complexityScore (1-100, where 100 is most complex)
* storyPoints (total estimated story points)
* estimatedHours (total engineering hours)
* estimatedMilestones (recommended number of milestones)
* riskLevel (low/medium/high/critical)
* reasoning (brief explanation of complexity assessment)

Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
{
  "complexityScore": 0,
  "storyPoints": 0,
  "estimatedHours": 0,
  "estimatedMilestones": 0,
  "riskLevel": "",
  "reasoning": ""
}

=You are a project scope change analyst.

Analyze scope changes for this project:

Client ID: {{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.clientId }}
Merchant ID: {{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.merchantId }}
Current Requirements: {{ $("Store Traceability MongoDB").item.json.traceabilityRecords ? JSON.stringify($("Store Traceability MongoDB").item.json.traceabilityRecords) : "[]" }}
GitHub Audit Data: {{ $json.message.content }}

Query the previous project version from MongoDB and compare:
* Identify added requirements
* Identify removed requirements
* Identify modified requirements
* Calculate impacted milestones
* Estimate additional engineering hours
* Assess timeline impact
* Assess escrow impact
* Calculate risk delta

Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
{
  "version": "",
  "addedRequirements": [],
  "removedRequirements": [],
  "modifiedRequirements": [],
  "impactedMilestones": [],
  "additionalHours": 0,
  "timelineImpact": "",
  "escrowImpact": "",
  "riskDelta": ""
}

=You are a senior software engineering estimator.

Analyze the following project requirements and calculate complexity metrics:

Project Scope: {{ $("Check Validation").item.json.planData.projectScope }}
Requirements Breakdown: {{ $input.first().json.message.content }}
Budget: ${{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.budget }}

Calculate:
* complexityScore (1-100, where 100 is most complex)
* storyPoints (total estimated story points)
* estimatedHours (total engineering hours)
* estimatedMilestones (recommended number of milestones)
* riskLevel (low/medium/high/critical)
* reasoning (brief explanation of complexity assessment)

Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
{
  "complexityScore": 0,
  "storyPoints": 0,
  "estimatedHours": 0,
  "estimatedMilestones": 0,
  "riskLevel": "",
  "reasoning": ""
}

=You are a project scope change analyst.

Analyze scope changes for this project:

Client ID: {{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.clientId }}
Merchant ID: {{ $("Webhook Trigger").item.json.body.merchantId }}
Current Requirements: {{ $("Store Traceability MongoDB").item.json.traceabilityRecords ? JSON.stringify($("Store Traceability MongoDB").item.json.traceabilityRecords) : "[]" }}
GitHub Audit Data: {{ $json.message.content }}

Query the previous project version from MongoDB and compare:
* Identify added requirements
* Identify removed requirements
* Identify modified requirements
* Calculate impacted milestones
* Estimate additional engineering hours
* Assess timeline impact
* Assess escrow impact
* Calculate risk delta

Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
{
  "version": "",
  "addedRequirements": [],
  "removedRequirements": [],
  "modifiedRequirements": [],
  "impactedMilestones": [],
  "additionalHours": 0,
  "timelineImpact": "",
  "escrowImpact": "",
  "riskDelta": ""
}
